leadText: Sizzly Slide (Japanese: めらめらバーン Blazing Burn) is a damage-dealing Fire-type move introduced during Generation VII, in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. It is one of the signature moves of the partner Eevee.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VII [ edit | edit source ] Sizzly Slide deals damage and burns its target when it hits. Generation VIII onwards [ edit | edit source ] Sizzly Slide cannot be selected in a battle. However, it has been modified: its PP was changed to 20 while its power was changed to 60.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description P E The user cloaks itself in fire and charges at the target. This also leaves the target with a burn. Sw Sh BD SP LA S V This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Even though this move cannot be used in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet , one of the obtainable camera effects in the League Club Room is named after Sizzly Slide. It shares this trait with Buzzy Buzz .
